task.title: Harden Codex GPT-5.5 local CLI compatibility

events.content: Use Codex debug model catalog instead of version guessing: Use Codex debug model catalog instead of version guessing

raw.question: Use Codex debug model catalog instead of version guessing
raw.chosen: Use Codex debug model catalog instead of version guessing
raw.reasoning: The local Codex CLI exposes a debug model catalog, so relay can verify whether gpt-5.5 is supported by the installed binary and fall back only when support is absent or unprobeable.

events.content: Treat catalog upgrade markers as unsupported models: Treat catalog upgrade markers as unsupported models

raw.question: Treat catalog upgrade markers as unsupported models
raw.chosen: Treat catalog upgrade markers as unsupported models
raw.reasoning: A Codex catalog can expose a model slug while marking it as requiring an upgrade; relay should only pass gpt-5.5 through when the local catalog says the entry is usable.

retrospective.summary: Hardened Codex GPT-5.5 spawning by checking the local Codex debug model catalog before injecting --model gpt-5.5. Relay now passes GPT-5.5 through when the installed CLI catalog confirms support, falls back to gpt-5.4 when support is missing/unprobeable or the catalog marks an upgrade requirement, preserves explicit user --model args, and records the effective model in the worker spec. Added parser tests and verified cargo check/test plus focused TS tests.
